title: Dashboard visualization, pivot table, and authoring improvements
body:
* **Dashboard subscriptions to Slack channels**: Dashboard authors can now add Slack channels as subscribers to a scheduled dashboard refresh. See [Subscribe a Slack or Microsoft Teams channel](/aws/en/dashboards/share/schedule-subscribe#add-subscriber).
* **Top N scroll bar behavior**: The scroll bar on top N visualizations now appears only on mouseover for a cleaner interface.
* **Legend placement options**: You can now place legends at the top and left of visualizations in addition to existing placement options. See [Customize chart elements](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations#format-details).
* **Cut, copy, and paste filters**: Authors can now cut or copy filters from the canvas. To paste them into the global panel, right-click an empty space and select **Paste**. See [Use dashboard filters](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filters).
* **Labels match Y-axis formatting**: Labels now default to the same format as the Y-axis, showing 2 decimal places by default and handling small values better.
* **Export to materialized view**: Authors can now generate a materialized view from any dataset on their dashboard for improved performance and more efficient refresh and execution. To access this feature, click the kebab menu next to a dataset, then select **Export to Materialized View**. See [Create and manage dashboard datasets](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/data-modeling/datasets) and [Materialized views](/aws/en/ldp/concepts/materialized-views).
* **Pivot table improvements**: See [Pivot table configuration](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/tables#pivot-table-configuration).
  + Authors can add links to text in pivot tables by specifying a URL path in the **Actions** tab of pivot table values.
  + Pivot table header values are now sticky and remain on screen while scrolling.
  + Users can conditionally set the text color in pivot tables.
* **Duplicative audit log events**: Dashboards with companion Genie Spaces no longer emit duplicative `getPublishedDashboard` events in audit logs.

ref_links.text: Subscribe a Slack or Microsoft Teams channel
